expectations.evidence: States 'This task follows the Sync BMAD Documents workflow (workflows/sync-bmad-documents.md), entering at Step 2'

expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs status to confirm the document is linked
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'node <skill-path>/scripts/sync.mjs status <file-path>' — 'Expected output: linked: true, ticket key DO-200'

expectations.text: Does NOT ask for link setup (skips to sync since already linked)
expectations.evidence: States 'Since the user confirms the link already exists, this should return linked status. If it does, skip to Step 3 (diff).' and Assumptions: 'no sync.mjs link step is needed.'

expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs push to send local changes to the Jira ticket
Reports push results showing which fields were updated
expectations.evidence: Step 7: Summary table showing 'Action | Section/Field | Result' with pushed fields like 'Overview -> Updated DO-200 description'
